# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively support the following versions of BetTraction with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Responsible Disclosure

At BetTraction, we take security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, we appreciate your help in disclosing it to us responsibly.

### Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do NOT create public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, please report them to us via:
- Email: security@bettraction.com
- PGP Key: [Available here](https://bettraction.com/pgp-key.txt)

Please include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment
- Your contact information (optional)

We will respond to your report within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue.

### Vulnerability Process

1. You report the vulnerability to us
2. We acknowledge receipt within 48 hours
3. We investigate and validate the vulnerability
4. We develop and test a fix
5. We release the fix and notify you
6. We publicly disclose the vulnerability (after a reasonable grace period)

### Security Contact

- Email: security@bettraction.com
- PGP Fingerprint: `0x1234567890ABCDEF1234567890ABCDEF12345678`
- Response Time: 48 hours

### Bug Bounty Program

We offer a bug bounty program for security researchers. Please contact us for more details.
